verses.1: Ascribe to the LORD, you sons of the mighty,
verses.2: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due to his name.
verses.3: The LORD’s voice is on the waters.
verses.5: The LORD’s voice breaks the cedars.
verses.6: He makes them also to skip like a calf;
verses.7: The LORD’s voice strikes with flashes of lightning.
verses.8: The LORD’s voice shakes the wilderness.
verses.9: The LORD’s voice makes the deer calve,
verses.10: The LORD sat enthroned at the Flood.
verses.11: The LORD will give strength to his people.
